summary: Autonomous remediation classification for five ready-for-maintainer PRs. No direct GitHub mutations planned. Merge is not recommended because the shard lacks complete merge preflight, fresh Codex /review proof, and several candidates carry merge-risk labels. One linked cron PR is routed to central security because the preflight artifact marks it security_sensitive=true. No executable fix artifact is emitted because the viable contributor branches are still live and reviewable, and high-risk labels block automated repair artifacts for the merge-risk PRs.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR, but merge requires fresh preflight and the merge-risk labels block an executable repair artifact.
Useful open contributor PR, but session-state risk and missing merge preflight make it a reviewable related candidate rather than an autonomous merge.
Useful open contributor PR in an auth-provider surface; keep for maintainer review rather than autonomous merge or repair.
Best-looking reviewable candidate in the #92582 family, but merge-risk and missing merge preflight block merge and repair-artifact actions.
Useful open cron candidate, but the shard lacks merge preflight and one sibling is security-routed, so keep related for maintainer review.
Exact hydrated item is security-sensitive in preflight and must be handled by central OpenClaw security triage.
